name: Local Dominator
highlight_text: Best For: Accurate grid rank tracking
description:
What Local Dominator Does?

Local Dominator offers a granular view of your visibility, showing how you compare to competitors and identifying key areas where improvements are needed. With real-time updates and comprehensive data, the Grid Rank Tracking Tool enables you to make informed decisions to enhance your local SEO strategy and ensure your business ranks higher in local searches.

Source: Local Dominator

Features:

  • Supports white-label reporting features 
  • Has multiple grid sizes available 
  • Offers competitive insights to see how your competitors are performing geographically

Benefits:

  • The tool is built specifically for SEO agencies 
  • Get ahead of the competition by knowing where you’re lacking 
  • Provides accurate results with a click of a button
  • Has a clean user interface

Pros 

  • The customer service is prompt with their responses 
  • Affordable pricing options

Cons 

  • Might have a steep learning curve for people who are new to this and will need some time to get used to the platform

Priced at $59 Per Month, offers custom pricing options upon contact
